name: Fortress Unit - Threat
desc: A fully armed combat base, a product produced by numerous manufacturing units, can block all external enemies and create a large number of threatening ships to protect its body. Needless to say, its strength.

name: Barrier Unit - Threat
desc:
The upgraded threat orbital station has built a number of defensive bunkers equipped with heavy firepower on the original basis, and built a small number of threat ships to protect its body.

Its presence would prevent any bombing campaign from taking place.

name: Orbital Station Unit - Threats
desc:
A standard orbital station designed with threats in mind, equipped with multiple firepower modules, as well as an efficient hangar platform and impressive firepower.

Its presence would prevent any bombing campaign from taking place.

name: Threat maker
desc: Gestalt's rebel AI core is in charge of threatening forces throughout the galaxy, coordinating and managing every building, every fleet, and even every fragment, stabilizing the entire planet's military and civilian power.

name: Nanoreconfiguration array
desc: A giant factory that uses a large number of threat fragment components to manufacture all metal-related items. Although the production volume is not as high as that of ordinary industrial facilities, it can still support the needs of many colonies.

name: nano life support facility
desc: By continuously maintaining life-support facilities through infinitely replicating threat fragments, the ability to reduce environmental risks can be achieved no matter how harsh the environment is. The only problem is that the maintenance fee is too expensive.
